{{Quote|Reports are coming in of a major battle between Sikan forces and invading Chekut troops on the Sika homeworld. The Sikan administration has called for Galactic Alliance forces to intervene in what it calls 'an act of opportunist aggression,' and share prices have tumbled over fears that the invasion will draw more planets in the Expansion Region into the conflict.|[[HoloNet News and Entertainment|HNE]] newsflash|<ref name="Sacrifice" />}}
'''Sika''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]] that was invaded by opportunistic [[Chekut]] forces during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]]. It was home to the [[Sikan]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]'' {{1stm}}
